violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler and shelves/racks in cook line area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors walls and ceiling in kitchen.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door seal on 1 door upright freezer is warped/torn and needs replaced.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Kitchen handwash.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors, walls and ceilings in kitchen.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Keep back door closed except for exit/entrance and deliveries.
